title: Golden Toasted Spinach Delight
description: A smoky and creamy dish featuring caramelized spinach with a touch of vegetable shortening for added richness in this romantic Saudi Arabian recipe suitable for egg-free diets.

ingredients.name: 1 cup fresh spinach
ingredients.notes: adjust based on desired thickness of the dish

instructions: Wash and dry the spinach. Squeeze out excess water.
In a small saucepan, heat vegetable shortening over medium heat until melted but not boiling.
Add lemon juice and smoked paprika to the melted shortening; stir gently to combine ingredients.
Gently fold in the spinach leaves. Ensure they are fully coated with the mixture.
Transfer the spinach to a baking dish. Bake for 15 minutes or until spinach is tender and lightly golden brown.
Remove from oven, let it cool slightly before serving.
